headline: How $200 Oil Impacts Your Stocks and Your Wallet
summary: Oil is sitting at $96 a barrel as of March 13, 2026, up from $71 just ten days ago. The Iran war has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz, through which roughly 20% of the world’s daily oil supply flows.
